7. Repeat steps 3-6 if necessary, adjusting the rotation and move distances as required, until obstacle_ahead is false.
8. Once a clear path around the obstacle is found (obstacle_ahead is false), rotate Spot to face the direction of the target. Calculate the desired bearing to the target and set the Spot's forward bearing to match this desired bearing. Rotate_spot(calculated_degrees).
9. Move Spot forward by a bounded distance (up to 2 meters) toward the target. Move_spot(min(distance_to_center, 2.0)).
10. Verify if at_goal is true. If true, finish_task.
11. If at_goal is false, continue with the go_to_target strategy from the new position, recalculating the rotate_spot and move_spot actions as needed.
